## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and the implementation shape.

## Tests

- [ ] Relevant build/test commands ran locally.
- [ ] Fixtures added or updated for scanner/rule behavior.
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-facing behavior.
- [ ] Changelog updated for notable behavior changes.

## Security and product-safety checklist

- [ ] Dependency and workflow changes are pinned deterministically.
- [ ] Analysis remains local/offline by default unless explicitly opted in.
- [ ] Findings remain evidence-bound and do not overstate confidence.
- [ ] Advisory and enforce behavior remain distinct where applicable.
- [ ] Generated reports escape source-derived content where applicable.
- [ ] CLA signed, or the contribution is trivial or maintainer-owned.

## Notes

Call out known limitations, follow-up work, or intentional tradeoffs.
